description.en: Visa as the cardholder experiences it: free per-transaction, often rewarded with cashback or miles, accepted globally. The subsidy side of the network — the side that has to keep showing up so merchants will accept Visa.
description.zh: 持卡人眼中的 Visa:每笔支付不付费,经常还有返现或里程奖励,全球通用。这是支付网络的「补贴方」—— 这一边必须维持参与度,商户才愿意继续接 Visa。
